prompt: Cyberpunk still-life in hyper-detailed digital brushwork. A powerbank (looking as the one on image1 and image2) rests on obsidian-black mirrored glass. Lighting reduced to two symbolic sources — left-side cool-blue monitor glow and a glowing magenta-cyan neon strip along the desk edge, painted with metallic luster. Braided lanyard rendered in layered strokes; its transparent block refracts and reflects both light sources as stylized geometric highlights. LED display glows with luminous white glyphs ('100%'), mirrored in the glass. Palette strictly limited to black, deep indigo, electric purple, and cyan. 70% negative space for high-end minimalist impact.
